title: Introduction to Metabarcoding using QIIME2 - Echidna Dataset
author: Melbourne Bioinformatics
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the data and associated metadata file for the Melbourne Bioinformatics workshop (https://mdhs.unimelb.edu.au/melbournebioinformatics/teaching-and-training), Introduction to Metabarcoding using QIIME2 - Mammal Dataset. There are 38 samples in this dataset from the short-beaked echidna   Tachyglossus aculeatus.      5 samples from each individual (3x male and 3x female).  8 control samples (DNA extraction blanks (n=5) and PCR blanks (n=3))
steps_raw: This is the data and associated metadata file for the Melbourne Bioinformatics workshop (https://mdhs.unimelb.edu.au/melbournebioinformatics/teaching-and-training), Introduction to Metabarcoding using QIIME2 - Mammal Dataset.
